Soon your journey descends into the darker realms of the subconscious as you become the guiding hand that navigates its shadowy depths while piecing together echoes of the past.

Long forsaken gods have been left to rot beyond eternity, yet something still calls. Prepare for a dark odyssey where every disturbing encounter and mind-expanding puzzle will draw you deeper into the macabre.

to revive the corpses of their friends and use them as fighting forces.

It's not a choice, it's something you have to do to survive.

Solis is a hand-drawn adventure about technology and deception in a city at night.
During a company trip you explore the city of Solis from dusk till dawn, talking with its inhabitants and meeting colleagues. This night you learn the painful truth about the company you work for. Will you remain loyal?
In the game you explore an atmospheric and compact open world. Decisions within the game carry weight, influencing subsequent events, while the in-game text adjusts to reflect your choices.

In Solis you explore the city, investigate your surroundings and talk with the inhabitants and colleagues you meet. Decisions within the game carry weight, influencing subsequent events, while the in-game text dynamically adjusts to reflect your choices. Interactions are streamlined to utilize a single button, aided by context-sensitive interaction icons. The GUI is a sparse as possible. Solis offers multiple endings and is crafted to be concise and compact. The complete game is estimated to run for approximately 2,5 hours.

Each enemy presents unique attack patterns and weaknesses that require both strategy and quick reflexes to overcome. Boss encounters push combat mastery to the limit with multi-phase battles against legendary demons trapped between worlds.

Lirai: Heir of Darkness combines challenging skill-based combat, atmospheric world design, and narrative-driven gameplay, exploring themes of sacrifice, identity, and the corrupting nature of power.

Dragon Nest Classic brings players back to the golden age of Althea.
This service focuses on the authentic PvE raiding experience, featuring classic progression from Cerberus to Sea Dragon Nests.

Our philosophy is simple: prioritize the thrill of the hunt and tactical cooperation over rushed content updates. We aim to recreate the genuine "first-clear" excitement that defined the original Dragon Nest experience. Join a community of dedicated adventurers and reclaim your legacy in the Nests.

title: Latitude of the Cult

title: Monopoly: Star Wars Heroes vs. Villains
summary: A dynamic team-based twist on the world’s favorite family board game from Hasbro, Monopoly: Star Wars Heroes vs. Villains offers reimagined gameplay with cinematic moments, themed spaces, and dynamic elements so that no two matches are the same. Build teams with iconic Star Wars heroes and villains, each of whom brings unique abilities that can shape strategy and turn the tide in your favor with every roll of the dice. Teamwork and hero combinations play a pivotal role in securing victory.

title: Denshattack!

summary:
The Adventures of Elliot: The Millennium Tales is an action RPG set in the world of Philabieldia - a beautiful but savage land dominated by warring beast tribes. Humanity’s last bastion is the Kingdom of Huther, protected by its tall walls and Princess Heuria’s powerful magic.

When a mysterious set of ruins is discovered, a young adventurer named Elliot and his fairy companion Faie are sent off on a journey to investigate. What seems like a simple, if dangerous, mission soon becomes a grand saga that will be woven across time and space.

title: Slot or Die
summary: Lost in a cursed castle, a knight confronts the horror with the help of a relic-shaped slot machine. Stop the reels, chain attacks and bonuses, manage your inventory, and survive in this dark roguelite where every spin decides your fate.

title: Project XZ
summary: PROJECT XZ is a high-octane fusion of platforming, action, and tower defense strategy. Shoot, brawl, and upgrade your arsenal of skills to tear through anything in your way and decide the fate of the future.

title: SlotCrawler
summary: A roguelite, deckbuilding, slot machine, dungeon crawler. Build up synergies in your slot machine & slaughter monsters.

title: Moonlight Knight
summary: Moonlight Knight is an action-slasher with RPG elements. Use sword, bow, magic and hook to fight your enemies. Loot gold, upgrade character stats, find unique items and unlock ultimate abilities to make it to the very end!

title: Integrity
summary: Memory is pain, and oblivion is peace. A roguelike turn-based tactics RPG where you descend into the abyss, confront lost memories, and fight to survive through vision, terrain, and stamina management.

title: Calmed by the Dαrk
summary: Calmed by the Dαrk is an open-world Action-RPG where you can explore the fantastical world of Umbra Milenio. You play as John, a regular guy that ends up with the power to change the entire world. Break the rules, unlock new powers, make friends (or foes) and decide the fate of everyone!

title: Theropods
summary: Face dinosaurs, solve puzzles and travel back to the time of ginormous lizards and pixelated adventure games.

title: Blossoming Yandere
summary: You've moved into your first apartment. A girl gazes at you, craving your love. What are you to do when you're the center of someone's world? Make choices, explore your new home, piece together a mystery, and be careful. Your actions and words have consequences.

title: Wind Runners
summary: For centuries, the Realm uses fear and its military superiority to keep the Zarah Igna System under control, but a group of rebellious Ishma arises to fight its tyranny. With their superior aerial combat skills, the Wind Runners will bring freedom to all who live under the shadow of oppression!

title: Airport Contraband
summary: Take over the duties of a customs officer in this roguelike-simulation game where every suitcase could be a risk. Inspect documents, question passengers, scan luggage, and seize illegal goods as you try to maintain control at Caldora Airport. Will you uphold the law or profit from contraband?

title: ExoMecha
summary:
ExoMecha is a brand new free-to-play online competitive first-person shooter that takes place in Omecha, a new and untouched planet with exotic environments. ExoMecha offers you breathtaking gaming experience with its flexible playing style, mechs, unique gadgets and abilities, and boss battles.

​ExoMecha is an immersive experience with team-based large scale battles, a unique battle royale game mode, and an objective-based game mode.

title: Rogue Mansion
summary:
Rogue Mansion is a survival horror game combined with the best of the roguelike genre! Explore a procedurally generated mansion that changes every time you play, and becomes more dangerous and unpredictable according to your level of fear.

Experience the game in different ways, by choosing from multiple unique characters, each with their own equipment, specialist perks, and motivations.

title: Redemption of the Damned
summary:
You are a field doctor's assistant who was heading to a distant village to help local peasants. Someone attacked your stagecoach and you wake up in a mass grave, being the only survivor.

The player fights against monsters and other evil spirits in various biomes of the cursed forest, and the only safe place is the village, where he can complete tasks, recuperate or replenish supplies. In each location the player will meet with the guardian of this zone - the boss, who is the iconic character of the folklore of Western and Eastern Europe. The main goal of the game is to get into the high castle in order to eliminate its owner.

The player's arsenal is represented by a wide range of firearms typical for the chosen era - ancient flintlock pistols, classic revolvers, muskets and rifles, as well as special tools for certain types of enemies like vampires, ghouls, werewolves, swamp creatures, spirits, etc.

What scared you, being myths and scary tales, becomes reality and...attacks!

title: Nocturne
summary: The afterlife is now digital. Discover that eternal life comes with sacrifice in a genre-defying RPG with unique rhythm combat.

title: Sparkball
summary: Sparkball is a 4v4 adrenaline-packed ‘sports brawler’ where players select from a cast of lovably unique heroes and carefully balance both ballin' and brawlin' to score in the enemy team's goal! Affectionately described as League of Legends meets Rocket League (or Kung Fu-tbol!), Sparkball grips you immediately with its dopamine-inducing take on combat sports and keeps you coming back for more as you strive to master its surprisingly complex strategies.

title: MegaBattle
summary: Build robots and enter the arena to battle! Robots have taken control of the galaxy and now humans must build bots to fight in the MegaBattle Arena. MegaBattle combines the best of the CCG with innovative mechanics such as unique mana mode, opponent reading attack and a fast card draw system.

title: Dystopicon
summary:
In Dystopicon the players will live in a dystopian society in which they receive money in exchange to watch TV. With that money they pay services to cover their basic needs. Throughout the game they will discover the details of this dystopia in which the government monitors your movements but gives you freedom of choice.

The story will be told through gameplay, texts and comics. Take your time to explore the different objects and the mechanics in your first day.

title: Gowf: A Golf Adventure
summary: Gowf is an arcade style golf game with a classic 3-click hit system. Features an RPG style adventure mode where you can level-up and customize your character's skills and equipment to win tournaments across a variety of courses and online play with up to 8 friends.

title: Mina the Hollower
summary:
Mina the Hollower is a bone-chilling action-adventure game featuring classic gameplay and an 8-bit aesthetic in the style of Game Boy Color, refined for the modern era.

Quick and deliberate 60fps action combat, captivating world design, and top-down adventuring combine in a nostalgic blend. Whip foes, burrow through the ground, and explore a pixel-perfect world in Mina the Hollower, a brand new game from the developers who brought you Shovel Knight!

similarGames.name: Anima: Gate of Memories - The Nameless Chronicles

title: Occulto
summary: Occulto is an indie adventure game with a focus on artistic hand-drawn visuals and a non verbal game play, set in a fantasy world. Guide Eliot through riddles, mysteries, puzzles, strange creatures, faraway places and help him find his master!

title: Galactic Diner
summary: Become the best chef in the galaxy! Cook for aliens, make new friends, and go head-to-head against other chefs to win it all in a game show where the customer is always right!

title: Dreaming Worlds
summary: Dive into the dreaming worlds of the four dream keepers and find out why they don't answer anymore. Rescue the trapped inhabitants of the dream worlds, change the dreams back to good and discover mysterious places and puzzles. But something dark will stand in your way.

title: Athanasia
summary: Athanasia is an action survival horror immersive sim where you explore a mysterious facility and use everything you have to survive with an arsenal of equipment as well as your wits against time traveling predators from prehistory and the future.

title: Glaciered
summary: Glaciered is an action-adventure indie game that takes place on a glacier-covered Earth 65 million years in the future. Play as a Tuai, a species evolved from birds, to soar through the seas and fight against the threats to this new golden age of life.

title: Adventures of Ruby Rabbit
summary: "The Adventure of Ruby Rabbit" is a light action shooter adventure game. In the game, you can control Ruby the cute bunny, fight the bunny balls, and grow as she grows.

title: Daomei Village
summary: You have been banished to Daomei Village for your offense. In order to return to the Emperor's favor, you must make an effort. Repair, build, cultivate fields and fight various adversities. Meet new friends and learn their stories. Do whatever it takes not to be banished forever!

title: The Henchmen
summary: The Henchmen is a pulp-inspired, 90s fueled top-down, action retro open-world game set in the fictional city of New Queens during 1979 and 1991.

title: Nowhere Manor
summary: House of stolen devil bargains and indolent angelic aristocracy: Nowhere Manor is doomed to disappear. You can leave if you’ve got a soul … but that’s not an option for an artificially created servant such as Liber. Just how far are you willing to go escape?

title: Control Resonant
summary: Explore a warped Manhattan on the brink of paranatural annihilation in this thrilling action-adventure RPG. Unleash the extraordinary powers of Dylan Faden as he fights for his humanity and survival against a reality-bending cosmic threat.

title: Huni Kuin: Beya Xinã Bena
summary: A 2D platform game about the ancient stories of the Huni Kuin indigenous people, who live in the Brazilian Amazon. The entire game was produced in collaboration with the Huni Kuin communities of the Jordão river, in Acre.

title: Vampire Rancher
summary: Rancher by day, Vampire by night. Manage your time and resources to restore your sleepy little town to its former glory, all while satisfying your vampire needs for blood. Oversee shops and saloons, farm crops and humans, and explore ancient vampiric ruins in the Weird Wild West!

title: Shark Rain
summary: The very first Shark-Based Shooter game! Become a cute shark-girl and speed through water then emerge in human form and blast your enemies to oblivion! Nowhere will they be safe, not even on land!

title: Remorses
summary: Learn terrifying witchcraft and investigate. Sanity? Open windows, or lose it.

title: Changer Seven
summary: Fast-Paced Lane-Based Action Brawler. The legendary Changers 7 heroes must fight a new threat that changes the citizens of Sunny Point into terrifying beings! But as they investigate and defeat "villain of the week" like enemies, they suspect that someone from their own group may be behind it all.

title: The Last Grape
summary: The Last Grape is a game about fruits, vegetables and vengeance. Slice through your enemies with speed and precision in this action, fast paced platform where you control a tiny grape in seek for revenge.

title: Robo Frenzy
summary: Build and battle in Robo Frenzy! Create dozens of weapons and construct inventions to crush gigantic gadgets in a sandbox action game that blends crafting with combat.

title: Not Only Nine
summary: A narrative turn-based RPG where the only fights are the bosses. Play as a cat and journey through the afterlife to save your human. Meet loveable characters and explore what it means to exist.

title: The Battle for Vega
summary: Inspired by the classic Space Invaders, The Battle for Vega takes the old-school gameplay you know and love and adds new features that make it a fresh and exciting experience.

title: Mariachi Legends
summary: Mariachi Legends is an action-packed mystery Metroidvania game. In Mariachi Legends, Join fantastical festivities at the Day of the Dead carnival alongside Detective Pablo Cruz, currently masquerading as a mariachi player to investigate an evil curse looming over the serene town of Santa Mascota.

title: Dimhaven: The Lost Source
summary: After several years, the team behind Quern - Undying Thoughts is back with new mysteries to unfold. Explore Dimhaven, solve mind-bending puzzles and uncover the truth behind the Ravenwood legacy in this first-person adventure.

title: The Hungry Town

The Hungry Town is an interactive visual novel in a dark fantasy setting with vampires.
You are a young vampire who has been drawn into a violent confrontation between two generations of vampires. You will have to choose a side or decide to stay true to yourself.

title: Neo Junk City
summary: Dive into Neo Junk City, a cyberpunk adventure where you’re an android detective unraveling your own murky past. Navigate neon streets, engage with unique characters, and race through the rain-soaked city. Uncover secrets in this twist on point-and-click gameplay.

title: Football, Tactics & Glory: World
summary: XCOM meets Football Manager. Embark on the career of an unknown coach: tactically outsmart opponents in turn-based matches, earn money and experience, search for talented players, manage a club, build your reputation to get invited to lead the national team, and win the World Championship!

title: Little Cheese Works
summary: This is a cooperative action game where you have to carry cheese to the goal without being found by cats. You can have a conversation with voice chat, but the slightest noise will wake up the cat. Let's carry the cheese quietly by breathing quietly so that the cat won't find it!

title: Peacemaker: Bloody Emperor
summary: A dark fantasy JRPG. The imperial princess Chrysoberyl must fight the Bloody Emperor who has usurped the throne. However, her army is small and her allies are conniving. It is a bloody war where she will have to choose between peace and lives...

title: Elemdian
summary: RPG that combines exploration with magic combat. Unfurl your claws as a powerful werewolf warrior wielding the power of the Elegems! A journey to find the Elegems, unleash devastating spells, and unravel the mysteries of Morrok.

title: Rubinite
summary: "Rubinite" is a dark fantasy boss rush action game that utilizes the unique mechanic "Focus" to pinpoint enemies' weaknesses and execute thrust attacks. Follow Ruby, a princess who has escaped from the Scarlet Kingdom, embarking on a journey of revenge to reclaim her kingdom.

title: Amp
summary: Dive into the synesthetic world of Amp, the neon rail shooter set in a polygonal rhythmic universe.

title: Fantastic Haven
summary: Restore the equilibrium of magic by saving endangered fantasy creatures. Build your shelter to welcome and protect them, explore unique regions, rally neighboring populations to your cause and rehabilitate creatures in their natural environment.

title: Soggy Beans
summary: Fish will come, fish will go. Take photos, collect beans, decorate your seascape, then relax or do other things while your friends swim by in this calming side-idler.

title: Mainland
summary: Enter a cooperative medieval realm, forge alliances, lead armies, and engage in epic battles. Shape history with dynamic politics, or test your mettle against others in fierce player-vs-player combat.

title: Desktop Explorer
summary:
Desktop Explorer is an exploration-puzzle game set in a retro-style operating system. Solve puzzles by interacting with built-in software features, immersing yourself into a realistic late 90’s computer experience.

The game follows a fairly innocent narrative as you progress through it’s puzzles. However it becomes clear to you that there is more than meets the eye with this machine, as you slowly see its familiar façade fade away in favor of a darker aesthetic..

title: Pight
summary: Pight is a minimalist puzzle game inspired by the Minecraft redstone system, in which we try to turn on the light block by using piston blocks and different block types.

title: The Witch's Bakery
summary:
The Witch’s Bakery is a 2D Adventure Puzzle game where you play as a joyful witch who opens a bakery in modern Paris.

She has a special power: she can heal emotions with her bread.

title: Momento
summary: Journey through a life where the objects you choose to keep influence the life you lead. A cozy room decorator with whimsical settings; relaxing gameplay; and charming branching narratives, Momento will be a warm ode to the challenge of following your dreams down the winding road of life.

title: Tidebound
summary: Tidebound is a fishing and inventory management game with a relaxing, casual atmosphere. Catch, sell, upgrade your boat, and sail further to catch more expensive and exotic sea animals. Casual yet engaging, the game offers a sense of progress with tons of equipment and hundreds of species to catch.

title: Wildsite
summary: Crash-landed on an unknown planet filled with plasma and toxic weather. Your only hope? Bob, a sarcastic-genius AI who will question your every survival decision. Explore, build your mobile base and try to avoid death alongside up to 3 friends in Co-op.

title: Advaria: Chronicles of Immortality
summary: Welcome, my Lord, to the cursed kingdom. A land plagued by black magic and creatures that crawl out of the darkness. Once this was a great kingdom. It could be great again. That's all up to you. Enter the world of Advaria - a hero defense game set in a world of fantasy and adventure.

title: Teeto
summary: Teeto is a 3D adventure platformer where you play as a tiny blob and bunny duo on an extraordinary journey. Absorb objects from the world, harnessing their powers to fight the shadow corruption and help out a cast of crazy characters in an action packed adventure!

title: Emery Hearts
summary: Immerse yourself in this thrilling action JRPG and uncover the secrets of Emery crystals as you face challenging enemies that will demand all your skill and ingenuity to defeat them.

title: Infinity Knights: Xross
summary: A King and his Infinity Knights wield The Armaments - weapons capable of reviving slain enemies. Xross, the newest Infinity Knight, will embark on a life-changing adventure as he experiences both the thrill and dark reality of what it means to be eternal.

title: Delverium
summary: Explore, Build, Farm, Craft and Fight in this vast procedurally generated survival adventure for up to 4 players. What you do is up to you, but the deeper you delve, the more you uncover the hidden truth. Could you be the hero to restore stability to the land and put an end to the invading "Faults"?

title: Head Chef
summary: Head Chef is a restaurant management game. Supply the kitchen, select your staff, create a delicious menu and… cook! Make your guests happy and find your way to the stars. Keep control of your team and finances, because the higher you climb, the harder you fall.

title: Emblems: Sunless Vow
summary: Can they stop arguing long enough to escape the void?! A Roguelike Visual Novel with QUICK turn-based combat and flexible difficulty. Calculate, power-up, and stack favors to The Heart's content... Or take on a narrative campaign filled with Mystery + Drama + Shenanigans.

title: LlamaRPG: Farm to Fable
summary: A turn-based combat RPG following a llama traveling around the world trying to be a hero. Full of great itemization, crafting, story, hat collecting, and more.

title: Hexforger
summary: Craft your spells in ONLINE CO-OP with your friends in this SURVIVORS-LIKE! Slaughter monsters, gain gold, upgrade your spells to infinite heights. Crush challenges and unlock new spells, upgrades, pickups, realms. Up to 4 players in this unique twist on the survivors-like formula!

similarGames.name: Nights of Azure 2: Bride of the New Moon

title: Terrible Lizards
summary: Terrible Lizards is a horror parkour game set against the backdrop of an old Route 66 attraction… with something dark and sinister lurking below. To escape, you’ll need to move fast, navigate challenging terrain, and uncover what Dalton’s Dinos is really hiding. You’d better start running.

title: One Fenix Down
summary: A retro-inspired, classic turn-based RPG for those with nostalgia for the '90s golden era. Explore a vast world with 14 playable characters, fight hundreds of unique enemies, and delve into an epic story of war, betrayal, and redemption.

title: Zerra's Adventure
summary: Zerra's Adventure is a classic turn-based RPG with no random encounters. Explore diverse areas, collect items and treasures to improve your team and defeat the strangest enemies. Level up, learn new attacks, and meet quirky characters on your adventure!

title: What Awaits, Aleksey?
summary: Utilize your analytical skills to connect the dots and unveil hidden conspiracies! Join the ranks of the People's Intelligence Bureau as a junior cryptologist, decipher cryptic messages and unravel plots brewed up by enemies of the state. Or . . . decide to save them...?

title: Prelude Dark Pain
summary: Prelude Dark Pain is a Tactical RPG set in a dark fantasy world. Assume the role of a local blacksmith named Soren, lead an uprising against the Order of the Ash Crusade and save a world ravaged by war.

title: Coding Day
summary: In "Coding Day", you are a videogame developer whose project is about to be released, but a sinister entity threatens its publication, and you must survive it throughout the night in a dark office building full of mysteries and dangers.

title: Maseylia : Echoes of the Past
summary: Maseylia : Echoes of the Past is a 3d metroidvania that aims to reproduce the experience of a 2d metroidvania in 3d. It features a labyrinthine world in which you'll need to collect upgrades to unlock new passages and make your way out of the labyrinth.

title: Below, Rusted Gods
summary: A short horror game where you control an operator helping an expedition through a hole descending into the unknown.

title: Aokaki
summary: Aokaki is a fast-paced 2D platformer where you play as an isopod ronin. Explore fun and challenging levels while battling against the forces of the evil Shogun in this bug inhabited pixelart world.

title: Shoe it All!
summary: Swing, fling, and cause chaos with your shoes in this physics-based mayhem. Discover secrets, unlock bonus levels, customize your look, and fill your journal with shiny stickers. Master the perfect throw and SHOE IT ALL!

title: Nocturnal II
summary: Nocturnal 2 is an action-adventure game that lets you explore and rekindle the dark depths and towering heights of the city of Ytash.

title: Pinball Hero
summary: In this game the pinball IS the hero! Ascend from the Goblin Caves, to the Perilous Plains and defeat the evil wizard in the Hallowed Castle to reclaim your adventurer spirit! Battle slimes, skeletons, goblins, ghouls, and other fantasy creatures in the retro-inspired reimagining of Pinball.

title: Barbarization
summary: Barbarization is a roguelite dungeon crawler with elements of bullet hell, deck building and strategy. Civilization fell to the dark legions now swarming this land. From the ruins of what is left, unlikely heroes emerge to reclaim it from the scourge.

title: Neo Ha_Bits
summary: Neo Ha_Bits plunges players into a chilling journey of psychological horror and mystery within a cyberpunk setting.

title: Cardinal Descent
summary: Cardinal Descent is a card building roguelike where you craft elemental synergies and find game breaking sticker combos.

title: Escape of The Hammer Princess
summary: A retro-styled rampage in both 3D and 2D! After years of waiting to be rescued, the Princess has decided to rescue herself. Escape as the princess in exciting retro-styled 3D, and relive the deaths of her would-be rescuers in classic 8-bit 2D! Bash some Skulls, Break Stuff, and Rise as a Legend!

title: Mightreya
summary: Join schoolgirl superhero Reya and her manager Nio as they embark on their journey as Hero Content Creators, fighting monstrous beings that emerge daily from a dimension beyond. Anime-inspired, heart-pounding hero action is waiting for you!
alternativeNames: 超能蕾雅的异次元之旅
超能蕾雅的異次元之旅

title: Coring
summary: Coring is a fast-paced, turn-based strategy game with rogue-like elements. Play as Pruner 'III', a reborn entity tasked with severing abnormal branches to protect the World Tree. Piece together memories to uncover the truth of your endless rebirth.

title: Ogora
summary: Ogora is a fantasy roguelike deck-builder where you will craft powerful decks, cast unwieldy spells, and blow up your own path through a procedurally generated dungeon. Adorn yourself with hidden trinkets and try to survive!

title: MineGeon: Renegades
summary: Descend into Planet Paimo in MineGeon: Renegades, a chaotic multiplayer roguelite where you choose your renegade, delve into the minegeons, and battle unique enemies across diverse biomes. Fight, gather, improve, and die to uncover the secrets of Paimo and New Olympia.

title: Scourge of the Reptiles
summary: Scourge of the Reptiles is a party-based tactical RPG set in a prehistoric fantasy world. When a meteor strikes the Earth, humans, elves and dinosaurs alike are gifted with magical abilities—abilities that result in war, devastation and forces that stretch far beyond the hero’s quiet home village.

title: Just A Shadow Game
summary: Hear me, pitiful mortals, for I shall reveal to you the path to true power - a demonic fusion of deckbuilding, ritual duels, and roguelite! I speak of a realm shrouded in darkness, where only the most wicked may thrive. Behold my masterpiece, "Just A Shadow Game".

title: Nightmare Circus
summary: Nightmare Circus is an action-adventure game where the player takes on the role of a Puppeteer trapped in the Nightmare Realm. Set out on a journey to find his friends and escape the nightmare!

title: Flowerbots
summary: Flowerbots is a chill and bouncy incremental game with synergies, strategic optimizations and a whole playground for your physical experiments!

title: Piñata Puppy World
summary: Piñata Puppy World is a 2000’s nostalgia driven explorative campaign game with a dramatic and surreal storyline disguised within the genre of “Mascot Horror”.

title: Eldritch Escape
summary:
In this roguelike bullet-heaven, Earth has been consumed by an ancient eldritch god. Form a customizable squad of survivors and explore decaying, metroidvania-inspired worlds trapped within the god’s belly. Battle endless waves of nightmarish creatures, extract resources, rescue survivors, uncover forbidden knowledge, and search for a way out.

Portals powered by ancient eldritch forces link worlds and realities, forming a tangled web. With a limited oxygen supply, your squad has just 20 minutes to navigate the portal network, jumping from world to world in search of the one escape route. Can you escape the void in time?

title: Operation Zero
summary: Grab your biggest gun and jump into this story-driven top-down run-and-gun sci-fi arcade shooter starring the ultimate bio-engineered hero-manchild TASKILLER!

title: Hotel Tales
summary: Hotel Tales is a mystery hotel manager set in the crossroads between worlds. Dive into the amazing, frightening and funny stories of guests and colleagues, discover the hotel's secrets and try to survive at least to the end of your probationary period!

title: Deforb
summary: Deforb is a roguelite top-down shooter game where a mad orb defends its tower using up to four melee guns, a long-range gun, and strategically placed turrets. Upgrade your skills and craft powerful builds to survive relentless waves of enemies.

title: Rock Island

summary: A gentle idle game with a living stream flowing quietly at the bottom of your screen. Terraform the land and watch as animals arrive to make Cozywood their home. Cultivate the surrounding area and bring this cozy ecosystem to life.

title: A Baby CEO?!
summary: A struggling book company has decided to hire you, a baby, to be the new CEO? All you need to do is manage the budget, keep the company brand strong and make the employees happy. You can't talk? No problem! Give a thumbs up or down and try your best.

title: Boiled
summary: America, 1925. A simple errand for an old friend pulls ex-gang leader Dan into a violent smuggler war on the border. A narrative-driven, adrenaline-pumping top-down shooter inspired by Hotline Miami, set in the 1920s Old West.

title: Tell Me Owl
summary: Embark on an exciting journey in a top-down western shooter inspired by classic NES action games. Battle through handcrafted levels, buy abilities, upgrade weapons to face multi-phase bosses in a world where a man's best friend is his revolver.

title: Reactonix Sandbox
summary: Reactonix is a flexible and enjoyable simulation sandbox where every force is at your command. Create ecosystems alone or with friends, experiment with physics and watch life evolve—or start an apocalypse for the sake of science. Complete freedom to create and destroy is in your hands.

title: Cat Chaos
summary: Knock things over, spin, play, and nap as a mischievous house cat.

title: Macaronpolis
summary: Macaronpolis is a simulation game that creates an efficient and universal process for customers to produce the products they want. You develop sales strategies by predicting customer demand, developing production designs, and sometimes finding solutions to problems faced by neighbors.

title: Banshee Bash
summary: Banshee Bash is a local-multiplayer party game. Fight with up to 3 friends (or add bots) to battle as a team, or in an epic free-for-all. Stack spell books to create unbalanced chaos and grab potion bottles to stay in the fight.

title: Cat Gladiator
summary: Cat Gladiator is a cute yet hardcore 2D Monster Hunter-style action game! Supporting 4-player online co-op,abundant weapons, armors and fun items for arena boss battles. The weapon is "easy to learn but hard to master". Turn into a cute cat gladiator and charge into the arena with partners!

title: Re: Spin. Die. Repeat.
summary: You died by misfortune and were reborn by fate. In this medieval slot-machine roguelike deckbuilder with isekai RPG roots, every spin shapes your destiny. Manipulate luck, outwit the Dark Goddess, and stop the quiet spread of darkness. Just when you think you reach the end the wheel spins once more.

title: CaseCracker3
summary: Sift crucial evidence from a sea of data. Reconstruct the case from fragmented narratives. Catch logical gaps hidden between the lines. Unearth the truth from the faintest traces! Youll need sharp logic and keen insight to conquer this fully immersive deduction challenge. Come onIm waiting.

title: The Zodiac Mystery
summary: Step into The Zodiac Mystery, where a suspense-filled adventure begins! Players are immersed in a complex and bewildering cold case, searching for clues across time and space. Examine crime scenes, review files, and analyze evidence, following the trail concealed within a celestial haze.

title: Bomberball
summary: Bomberball is a sci-fi multiplayer sports-shooter hybrid with class-based loadouts. Run, pass, and throw a planet-killer bomb into the opposing team’s rift. Fight in tightly-crafted arenas, and coordinate formations with your teammates. Experience the fast-paced, strategic combat of the future.

title: Chop Chop Together
summary: A chaotic 1–4 player co-op party game where housemates take on ridiculous jobs, earn cash, and put their friendships to the test during the wildest workdays imaginable. Work together under pressure, face unpredictable hazards, and survive fast-paced chaos where teamwork is the only way out.

title: Queen of the Community
summary: Tackle the challenge of raising a little girl into adulthood under the harsh conditions of a Brazilian favela. Be the girl's adoptive father or mother! Buy her clothes, furniture and other objects, change her haircut and more! She can befriend several kids! Your choices will define her future!

title: Korinki
summary: In Korinki you play as the dinosaur Archie. Fight and survive the arenas as the new chosen gladiator. Craft your weapons on the spot and take on the challenges each different arena provides. Discover your playstyle with the multiple skilltrees.

title: Atomcraft
summary: Adventure in a world where every pixel is physically and chemically simulated! In this ever-evolving sandbox, creativity meets chaos, and the only limit is your imagination!

title: Dungeon Twist
summary: Dungeon Twist is a turn-based tactical game focused on free-for-all multiplayer matches.Join a gang of filthy rogues and manipulate the Shifting Dungeon, an ever-changing maze full of loot and hazards.Trick your opponents, grab the Treasure… and get out alive!

similarGames.name: Pretty Girls Don’t Want You to Die

title: Hurling Herman
summary: A unique platformer where you hurl vials to create temporary platforms, navigate sprawling caves, and battle creatures. With an original soundtrack and immersive environments, a challenging adventure awaits you.

title: Paid in Blood
summary: Bet your blood in a twisted baccarat game to pay off your mob debt.

title: Date the Difference
summary: Date the Difference is a casual puzzle game where you spot differences between images while enjoying a light dating-themed atmosphere. Explore stylish scenes, find hidden details, earn rewards, and unlock charming characters through relaxing, attention-based gameplay.

similarGames.name: A Life in Silk: The First Cumming

title: Hamster Talk
summary: Hamster Talk is an idle social game that fits naturally into your day. Interact with lively hamsters on your screen, enjoy their cute reactions with a touch, visit friends’ towns, and have light chats with players around the world—all while your hamsters keep you company.

title: Flowsxty
summary: FLOWSXTY is a brutal, beautiful 3D trench runner where you dodge in four lanes and fight to survive to 60 seconds to clear a mode.

title: Island Restoration
summary: Bring procedurally generated islands back to life. Explore different biomes and damage scenarios. Relax as you clean, upgrade your tools, rescue wildlife, and watch each island return to its natural beauty. Customize your ship and decorate your own private island.

title: The Flinch: Unforgiven West
summary: To pull the trigger takes guts; to miss invites death. Hunt down 10 sinners in this mouse-only Noir Western. Battle your own nerves and a cursed revolver where hand tremors make every duel a gamble. How steady is your aim?

title: Paunchy Pets
summary: Paunchy Pets are your chubby little monsters that love to battle almost as much as they love to eat. Train them in flash-style mini-games, Feed them junk food in a cozy farming sim, Battle opponent’s pets in an autobattler based on skill, and Breed rare Paunchies to bolster your roster.

title: Caravan Tactics: For Gold & Glory
summary: Caravan Tactics is a roguelite casual RPG with turn-based mechanics. Travel from town to town, deliver goods, fight enemies, and overcome challenging encounters. Assemble your three heroes, each with their own unique abilities, and battle for gold and glory. Will you keep the caravan alive?

title: A little Jumpingspider's Garden Adventure (Day 1+2)
summary:
A little Jumpingspider's Garden Adventure is a mix of a 3D platformer and a mini game collection.
You follow the adventures of a cute little jumping spider, which needs to catch food and find a mate.
Each of the 16 levels has it's own unique game mechanics and offers a completely different experience.
Some levels test how fast you can react, others challenge your sense of direction and some are just the joy of collecting things.
Every level has 3 stages of difficulty (easy, normal and hard), which sometimes contain new mechanics and/or enemies.
This game is designed to be family friendly and approachable even for beginners (because of that you don't have to control the camera manually).

title: Forged: Reconquest
summary: Forged: Reconquest is a couch & online co-op blacksmithing RTS for up to 4 players. Team up as master smiths to forge magical gear, arm your armies, and wage war against otherworldly foes in a battle to reclaim your world.

title: Feywood Wanderers
summary: Explore the Feywood as you defeat enemies in tactical, turn-based battles. Find loot, abilities, secrets and meet helpful denizens of the forest as you delve deeper, customize your character with a great variety of classes, races, and equipment in this highly replayable extraction roguelike.

title: Health Audit Simulator
summary: Step into the shoes of a Health Auditor. FIND, FLAG and RATE potential Risks and Hazards across 20 playable environments, between two differing difficulty variants.

title: Funnel Runners
summary: Trapped in a doomed city, you and up to 7 friends must scavenge parts, fix your van, and escape the brutal tornado that approaches. A first-person co-op survival game with escalating disasters and total environmental destruction.

title: Worlds Upon The Wind
summary: Resettle the shards of a shattered world in this peaceful roguelite deckbuilder, covering centuries of classical Japanese art. Nurture communities, befriend animal spirits, and shape a new civilization through choices that echo across generations.

title: Daice
summary: DAICE is a unique merge of turn-based dice-powered combat with inventory management, a roguelite where you control an evergrowing AI Core. Purchase and pilot unique spaceships, load your dice into weapons and systems, and unleash devastating combos and shape your own strategy-driven story.

title: Drunk Dad Vs Family
summary: A chaotic 4v1 multiplayer game where a family must put their drunk father to sleep before he loses control.

title: S.T.A.L.K.E.R. 2: Cost of Hope
summary: The first major expansion for Heart of Chornobyl coming this summer, including a huge new storyline that can take dozens of hours to complete, two new regions, new and returning characters, and much more.

title: Dino-Might
summary: Dino-Might is a 2-4 player party fighting game where you control a tiny-armed t-rex in a fierce battle! Use arcade-inspired movement and power-ups to eliminate opponents, all while avoiding hazards. Easy to pick up, hard to put down, and built for all gamers. Only the best dino will survive!

title: Socrates Ragebait
summary: Socrates and his crew are back and they won't stop yapping. Block the doors, survive the philosophical ragebait, and contain these ancient thinkers before they break your brain.

title: TD Master
summary: Build, upgrade, and defend in this tactical tower defense experience. Place traps, manage resources, and survive increasingly intense waves of enemies in a system-driven, replayable strategy game.

title: Disquieted
summary: An action game set in Naples, a world distorted by shadows and anxiety. Take control of Connie, fight with a dynamic system of dashes, parries, air attacks, and combos, and uncover what lies beneath the city and within your mind.

title: SnowRunner: Season 18 - Patch & Power
summary: Patch & Power Season of Snowrunner. Included in the Year 5 Pass. Requires the base game SnowRunner to run.

title: Airport Security Sucks!
summary: Embody your inner power-tripping TSA agent and hunt down other players attempting to blend in and smuggle contraband past you. Control the crowd and your problematic K9 with authoritative voice commands, and use "compliance devices" to apprehend smugglers making mischief or hiding in plain sight.

title: UFO 50 Nonagrams
summary:
UFO 50 Nonograms is an unofficial fangame of Mossmouth's UFO 50.

If you enjoy Nonograms and UFO 50, this game is quite literally made for you.

After a crash-landing on Zoldath, you must repair the Campanella by solving Nonogram puzzles. UFO 50 Nonograms is also an incremental game. As you solve puzzles, you will collect resources which will allow you help out others and craft upgrades.

title: Pokor
summary: Pokor is a story-driven roguelike tactical turn-based card RPG. Players take on the role of Heart, commanding a deck of playing card soldiers to engage in turn-based battles against enemies as they venture deeper into a vast, pale, and ever-changing palace to uncover the truth and the true self.

title: Bet on It
summary: Step up to the table for a high-stakes game of intense survival where every pull of the trigger could be your last. Wager your life for chips against friends or AI, and unlock rare loot. Will you walk away wealthy, or lose it all?

title: Evergarden
summary: Evergarden is a relaxing idle incremental about turning a tiny barren patch into a lush, living island. Restore tiles with your shovel, let workers gather resources, meet pets, and watch the ecosystem quietly spread on its own.

title: Hex Shop
summary: After inheriting your grandmother’s witch shop, buy, craft, and sell apothecary wares while demons slowly consume you.

title: Unfair War: Survivors
summary: This is NOT a "forever" roguelike for thousands of hours. It's a game for a few cozy evenings. Download — launch — play immediately. No skill trees, no boring meta-grind. Just pure co-op action: you're chained together, dodging waves of robots, throwing grenades, and triggering ultimates.

title: Hecatomb
summary: Hecatomb is a mythic deckbuilding roguelike that tests how much you're willing to sacrifice. Every action produces Offerings, which can be relinquished to the Gods in exchange for powerful effects. But which Gods you worship and which you scorn have lasting effects on your journey to the Underworld.

title: Final Fantasy Blackmoon Prophecy Remake
summary:
A full remake of the 2011 RPG Maker 2003 game, Blackmoon Prophecy, redeveloped in RPG Maker and released in 2026.

Save Gaia from a malevolent evil in this oldschool retro JRPG by traversing the planet to safeguard the Crystals of the Element from harm.

title: Docked: DLC 1
summary: Gain access to DLC 1, arriving in Spring 2026, featuring a magnet gripper, one additional milestone, a variety of new jobs and multiple infrastructure upgrades to grow your operations.

title: Jett Rider Mini H.E.R.O.
summary: Jett Rider Mini H.E.R.O. is a classic Game Boy-style adventure set in the Jett Rider universe. A small mission. A big heart. A true handheld hero.

title: Am I Here?
summary: No character. No body. No mercy. Just footprints… and your inevitable failure.

title: Where Are the Fish?
summary: A short exploration game about driving around in a truck to find fish in the desert.

title: Parralysis
summary: You open your eyes in a surreal space, paralysed. The only thing you can do is to scarcely move your right arm, and scribble. Scribble in a notepad before you to move forward. Towards a goal you must reach, despite something horrific trying to reach you. Create the cure. You don't have much time.

title: A-01's Voyage.Logs
summary: Humanity has perished. You are an AI incapable of self-termination, sailing into the void. Trapped in terminal wakefulness, chew on your own endless, redundant processing power and face the ultimate decay of the universe alone.

title: Moventure
summary: 100 moves, 2 buttons, 0 tutorials. Master a massive moveset hidden within a D-Pad and 2 buttons. Conquer +100 levels in the ultimate movelike precision platformer.

title: Syntax: Overload
summary: Compile. Execute. Overload. A strategic roguelite where Syntax is Everything. Drag & drop modules to optimize your execution queue, install .EXE software to break the rules, and face off against legendary viruses like ILOVEYOU and WannaCry. Can you crash the system and escape?

title: Canvas of Thoughts
summary: Canvas of Thoughts is an cozy point-and-click puzzle adventure which invites you into Evi's vibrant but loud inner world. Experience everyday situations through shifting colours, sounds and emotions. Solve reflective puzzles and navigate the world not through words, but through feelings.

title: Orbital Traffic Controller
summary: Orbital Traffic Controller is a sci-fi spaceship management game set in the Solar System. Become an interstellar traffic controller, directing vessels from planetary holding patterns and warp gates to atmospheric reentry, all while avoiding collisions with other spacecraft and planetary bodies.

title: Puzzlor
summary: A strategic rogue-lite puzzle game where you collect and place Tetris-style pieces to defeat fantasy villains, unlock characters and upgrades, and build powerful runs. Focused on replayability, quick sessions, and meaningful strategic choices. Set in a traditional high fantasy world.

title: The Old Man and His Cat
summary: Play as Domino, a stray cat in love with food, in this heartwarming adventure where you help an old man overcome his grief after his wife passed away. Use your feline skills to explore and solve puzzles as you strive to bring joy into the old man's life and build an unbreakable bond with him.

title: Evolution Survival
summary: Evolution Survival is a survival game where the universe evolves around you. The plants and animals you saw at the beginning will be different at the end, They may not even be there, the star may have gone supernova or shrunk into a white dwarf. Who knows when Natural Selection is at the wheel!

title: Block Catching
summary: An online game of block catching with a twist. The catcher is not your friend.

title: Tomboy Adventure 2
summary: Start a relaxing adventure together with your (girl) friend!

title: Love in Space
summary: It is the year 2009. A short time after "the incident". Mankind has fled the scorched crusts of planet earth for a better life in space. Those unlucky few who still reside on earth are forced to live beneath the sea in leaky metal domes. This includes you... 50% Visual Novel - 50% Karaoke-Musical.

title: Cat-Astrophy
summary: Guide Polo, a brave abducted cat, through a vast universe of exotic planets. Face challenging combats, customize your abilities, and choose your own path in this epic space odyssey to uncover Polo’s lost memories.

title: Mistfall Hunter
summary: Mistfall Hunter is a third-person action PvPvE extraction RPG. Gear up for different classes, master combos and strategic skills, and face intense battles against monsters or players, solo or with teammates. Only a successful escape will secure your treasures.

title: SpeedRunners 2: King of Speed
summary: The ultimate competitive platformer is back! Outrun, outjump, and outsmart your rivals in cutthroat online/local races, now up to 8 players. Master the movement, learn meticulously designed maps, use powerful pick-ups, swing around with a grappling hook, and don't get knocked off-screen!

title: Thumps & Blows
summary: Chaos and fun are guaranteed in this fighting game, where a quirky cast of stickmen battle each other using ridiculous techniques in fast-paced fights with easy-to-learn yet unexpectedly deep mechanics.

similarGames.name: CatFight: The Ultimate Female Fighting Game

title: Empire in Decay
summary:
Empire in Decay is a roguelike deckbuilding turn-based tactical game, loosely based on chess. Its gameplay has been broadened with the use of cards and the progression of units. In the game, you'll proceed through procedurally generated routes across the districts of Daandria, the capital of the Empire.
In your journey to the Throne Hall to face the King, you will have to fight turn-based combats through different locations, collect cards and upgrade them, recruit units to support your cause and enhance them, find relics and forge artifacts to boost your powers, and use all your cunning and skill to make your way through waves of enemies.

title: Tales of Tonbrook
summary: Tales of Tonbrook is a life-sim/RPG hybrid. When you receive an invitation to the prestigious Daverton Adventurer's Academy, you take it! Study, perform missions for the school to pay your way, explore the world, make friends, fish, farm, find hidden ruins, and much more!

title: Fractured Library
summary: A cozy 2D pixel art adventure where you explore magical worlds, solve whimsical puzzles, and collect crystal fragments to restore a misbehaving library: no combat, just curious discoveries and a dash of chaos.

title: A Dogs Dream
summary: Test your sixth sense. Will you eat a wild rabbit, or tie someone to the train tracks? Every choice is yours to make. May you find a reason to laugh inside your nightmares.

title: Thirsty Princess
summary: Thirsty Princess is a fast-paced, top-down party game for 2–4 local players where you and your friends compete to drink beer with an impatient and unreasonable princess. Get drunk and slowly lose control while you brawl, steal from and sabotage your friends to win the favour of your princess.

title: Valkyrie Tune: Synthesis of Souls
summary:
A visual novel that brings the "Valkyrie Tune" plastic model series by Good Smile Company to life.
Experience the resonant story of an amnesiac protagonist and six stunning heroines, whose intertwining serenade of love, sorrow, and fateful encounters calls forth a reboot for the future.

similarGames.name: The Seven Deadly Sins: Knights of Britannia

title: Ella's Nightmare
summary: Linear single-player game with puzzles and alternate endings. Control Ella and explore the rooms of the house, solving puzzles to progress and escape before becoming a victim of the lurking creature.

title: Chasm Shift
summary: A 2D pixelated platformer journey through a mysterious and vast maze of puzzle box dungeons. Solve puzzle-infused platforming challenges and uncover new abilities as you plunge into an atmospheric adventure.

title: Top Drifters
summary: A frantic top-down racer with simple old-school arcade controls, vibrant low-poly graphics, high-speed chaotic races and physics-based, drifting-focused driving. Master 10+ different cars with unique driving stats, tear through unconventional. semi destructible tracks and become the "Top Drifter".

similarGames.name: Pain 'n Dave: The Maze of Malice

title: The Gardener
summary: Solve tile based lawn puzzles. Explore the grounds of a forgotten manor. Discover mysterious flora and figure out their rules. Cut grass and have fun!

title: The Industrial Council
summary: A cozy AI driven game where you play a journalist in a steampunk fantasy city. Change is coming to Raversul, and with the help of your imp and your newspaper you will play a powerful role in shaping it. Solve mysteries, uncover stories, and shape politics in this revolutionary new game.

title: Escape: Immersion
summary: Escape: Immersion is a horror adventure inspired by Inside and Little Nightmares. An atmospheric survival adventure with puzzles, platforming, and unpredictable challenges inside a collapsing underwater lab.

title: Antichrist
summary: As a journalist, you made headlines back in 2006 with a groundbreaking story. Years later, an anonymous call tied to that very event leads you to an horror house. But this house may belong to the Antichrist believed to appear at the end of days. You’re chasing a story… but it might be your last.

title: Phantom Floor
summary: You are trapped on the Phantom Floor. You must find a way to escape, but keep quiet, it's always listening.

title: Galdromeda
summary: Turn-based RPG with space combat. Assemble a crew, each having their own unique abilities, level up, upgrade your ship and your crew's abilities, collect new outfits for your crew.

similarGames.name: Marvel Ultimate Alliance 3: The Black Order

title: Planet Flipper
summary: A short turn-based planet management sim about flipping a world for profit. Balance supply, unrest, famine, and conflict. Or let it collapse and cash out before it’s too late.

title: EverQuest Legends
summary: Build your hero, adventure your way, and forge your legend!

similarGames.name: Anima: Gate of Memories - The Nameless Chronicles

title: Strafest
summary: Strafest is a third-person co-op platformer full of physics-based minigames! Join friends in dodge boulders in volcanic pits or outrun bridge-blasting cannons. Unlock colorful Skins, Trails, and Titles to customize your character. It’s all about teamwork, goofy moments, and having a blast together!

title: FishPond
summary:
FishPond is a pond-building sim where biology actually compounds.

Stock species into a living food web. Manage oxygen, predation, and diversity to keep things alive—then start pushing the system. Breed lineages across 12 inheritable traits. Unlock genetic tools. Automate harvesting. Expand your world.

Every fish has AI-driven behavior, a real genome, and a place in the food chain. Every population shift changes the music in real time. Every upgrade makes the whole thing run a little more like a machine—until you realize the machine is alive.

title: DragonSword: Awakening
summary: Explore the anime-style open world of the Continent of Orbis, brought to life with Unreal Engine 5! Recruit unique companions, unleash spectacular Status Ailment tag-team action, and embark on an epic journey to save the world from the threat of a Dragon reawakened after 60 years.

title: Rails & Rivals
summary: Rails & Rivals is a turn-based strategy board game in which 2-6 players build railroad networks on a hex grid, deliver colored goods between cities, and compete for the highest score. Players lay track tiles across terrain with varying costs, issue bonds for capital, upgrade their locomotive Engine, and industrialize gray towns into colored cities to create new delivery destinations. The game ends when a set number of cities are emptied, and the player with the most income track points wins.

title: Joy Malignant
summary: A visceral dice-based RPG in a cursed city of gut-wrenching suffering. Here, your past shapes your skills and your appearance. Survive the city's hellish trials, meet tortured characters, and develop your own unique identity. Every choice matters as your actions will literally shape you.

title: Mind Vessel
summary: An autobattler roguelite in which you are a Vessel formed by the unification of dead people's spirits. Dismember and graft them to customize their abilities, as you use them to find a way out of the void.

title: Stop and Smell the Flowers
summary: Relax in your shady garden and watch the flowers. Plant flowers, earn money, expand your garden, and trace the evolution chart to complete your collection.

title: Garden of Being
summary: Garden of Being is a handmade oil pastel art game and a quiet journal of moods. Plant flowers, dedicate gardens to loved ones, and create downloadable prints. A fusion of art and code where gardens come alive while you are in them, and wait silently when you leave.

title: Vivid Intrusion
summary: Survive as long as you can in this retro-styled movement shooter roguelike. Imbue your weapon with unique effects as you fight against a never-ending onslaught of enemies.

title: Orblins
summary: Orblins is a Marble-Matching Roguelike inspired by classic marble shooters like Zuma and Luxor. Create game-breaking builds with endless marbles and upgrades to defeat a host of Orblins and bosses. Choose from a large cast of characters or create your own custom class to personalize your run.

title: Question Roulette
summary: Prove your wits and composure in this ultimate fast-paced trivia challenge where knowledge, speed, and strategic risk-taking determine victory.

title: Hyperwired
summary: Pilot a ship with a charger hanging. Explore an ever-changing space an plug to recharge your energy while surviving the enemy breach in this cable-like space shooter with roguelike elements and plugged resource management.

title: Rhythm Heaven Groove
summary: The rhythm is starting up again! Rhythm Heaven Groove comes to Nintendo Switch!

similarGames.name: CatFight: The Ultimate Female Fighting Game

title: Crownseeker
summary: Hunt relics by day and night across a fog-shrouded world. Manage hunger. Gear up. Outlast or defeat what's hunting you. Collect all the relics — and the Crown appears. If you survive long enough to claim it.

title: The Glory Dungeon Raider
summary: Enter the depths of a treacherous dungeon in The Glory Dungeon Raider, a fast-paced 2D roguelike where every run is a new challenge! Arm yourself with various weapons, and face off against deadly creatures. Do you have what it takes to survive?

title: NightMaze
summary: What started as a simple urbex quickly turns into a nightmare: locked sewers, a trapped castle, a ruined village, and a procedural maze swarming with zombies. In co-op, search, loot, dodge, and survive together—before the undead find you first.

title: Hag's Hand
summary: A tower defense game that blends Brazilian folklore myths with card management. Protect the forest by summoning the creatures that dwell within the wilds. As invaders push deeper into the untamed woods, the witch Cuca merely watches their movement, waiting for the perfect moment to strike.

title: Operation Obliteration 2
summary: Operation Obliteration 2 is an old-school FPS stripped to the bone. Play any level in any order. Cut scenes are cut. Filler removed. No hand-holding. No safe spaces. Just weapons, enemies, and unlocked levels built to hit fast & hard. Adapt or die. learn or die again. Fight through a brutal alternate-history WWII campaign where aggression is survival and hesitation means death. Play the campaign straight through—or drop into any mission instantly. Nothing hidden or locked and every level available. All levels can be finished, your are given the resources, find them and use them correctly! Improvise, adapt and overcome!

title: Moonlight Peaks
summary: Live the vampire life in the magical town of Moonlight Peaks! Master the art of potions and spells, manage your supernatural farm, and leave your mark on the magical town. Make friends with the local werewolves, witches, and mermaids, and find your eternal love in the supernatural dating scene.

title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced
summary: The iconic solo pirate adventure returns with Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced, launching on July 9, 2026. Sail the Caribbean as Edward Kenway during the Golden Age of Piracy in this faithfully enhanced remake featuring stunning visuals, upgraded gameplay, and new content.

title: Granblue Fantasy: Relink - Endless Ragnarok
summary: Known for its dynamic combat, ensemble of versatile characters, and thrilling online cooperative play, Relink returns with expanded solo and multiplayer content, bringing endless adventure to skyfarers both new and old.

title: Gunvolt Chronicles: Luminous Avenger iX 1+2 Dual Collection
summary: The apeX of 2D action, the Luminous Avenger iX series, complete and refined. With all DLC and new balance updates, both games reach their peak. Plus an all-new "Endless Battle" mode. This special update is perfect for new and returning players alike.

title: Backyard Baseball
summary: A New Backyard Baseball game is launching in Summer 2026. The timeless classic is leveling up with all-new game modes, new ways to play, brand-new features and more. It’s the game you love, reimagined for a whole new era. Get ready for Backyard Baseball like you've never experienced it before.

title: Digimon Story: Time Stranger - Farm Item Golden Moai
Digimon Story: Time Stranger - Costume Swimwear Set
Digimon Story: Time Stranger - Costume Public Safety Suit & Special Supplies Set
Digimon Story: Time Stranger - Costume Cyber Sleuth Set
Echoes of Aincrad
summary:
Step into the legendary floating castle of Aincrad, a realm of breathtaking beauty and unforgiving danger. What seemed to be a dream adventure has now become a fight for survival. Among thousands of trapped souls, your journey is yours alone; will you rise, endure, and forge bonds that define your destiny? Or will you perish while facing enemies stronger, faster, and more ruthless than you imagined?

This is not just a game. It’s a battle for survival.

Take up your weapon. Shape your legend. Conquer Aincrad. RISK YOUR REALITY!

similarGames.name: Is It Wrong to Try to Pick Up Girls in a Dungeon? Infinite Combate

title: Shipyard of Theseus
summary: A game about thinking about ships.

title: Ascend to Zero
summary: Have you ever wondered what it's like to stop the time? Ascend to ZERO is a time-control roguelike, in which you can use your special ability to stop the time itself and efficiently fight your way through the top. Freeze the time to dodge opponents' attacks using your unique ability, and always hold a higher ground for the combat. However, don't forget that the time allowed for you is confined.

title: Mysarium
summary: A cozy sandbox designed to accompany you as you go about your day. Take a break: relax, breathe, and create tiny worlds in glass. Grow plants, unlock new elements, and find secret combinations to summon special guests to photograph.

title: Sandwich +1

Travel across vast deserts, sunken kingdoms, radiant jungles, and sky cities as you uncover the truth behind the Bracelet of Dilmun and Gilgamesh’s transformation. Along your journey, you will ride the legendary Phoenix, born from the Three Impossible Legends of Arabic culture, and unlock ancient powers that guide you toward your final confrontation with the immortal king.
