Woodo tells the player stories and makes the player feel not lonely while playing. The game looks like a wooden kit from childhood.

title: Insect Worlds
summary: Immerse yourself in the world of insects. Explore fascinating forests and learn about their way of life. Complete quests and mini-games, fight or collect resources and cards. Admire the microcosm from a completely different perspective and learn new facts about plants and insects.

title: The Relic: First Guardian
summary: "Guardian, gather the pieces of the great relic and seal the void of darkness." In this action RPG, you embark on a heroic adventure to save the world in the dark as the last guardian. Start your journey as a guardian, gather pieces of great relic and close the void.

title: Holonoptic
summary: As the new CEO of a derelict company, you must deal (or side) with rogue corporate AIs, rebellious labor unions and globalist aristocrats. Holonoptic combines economic simulation and party-based RPG into a story-rich corporate alpine cyberpunk.

title: There's no way that tsundere girl I met in the infirmary will be my girlfriend
summary: "B-baka! Who said you could get in!? I'm not prepared yet!" "Oh well... since you're already here, why not stay for a while?" "D-don't misunderstand, okay? It's not like I asked you to stay because I like you or anything..."

title: Nomori
summary: Nomori is a mind-bending puzzle game where you need to control time and space to journey through a shattered spirit world. Take shortcuts through portals, rotate your perspective, and control the flow of time to move forward, whichever way that is.

title: Lucid
summary: Discover your own legend in Lucid. Platform through a crystalline world torn apart by calamity, absorb powerful abilities that expand movement and enhance combat against a diverse cast of enemies and bosses, all in gorgeous pixel art inspired by the golden age of 2D sidescrollers.

title: The Human Story
summary: The Human Story is a hidden object game set in a colorful, historically accurate miniature world. Explore different cultures and ages. Find characters, objects and little stories about our ancestors. Learn about their lives and piece together the history of humankind.

title: Mion and the Cursed Killer Hamster
summary: The Magnificent Mion is a warrior queen from Wharevarland. She battles a malignant verse-making kraken, tries to win the love of Count De Loboda, studies at an ordinary magical school, and she's also... crazy! Absurdism. Ridiculousness. Idiocy.

title: Elation for the Wonder Box 6000
summary: Elation For The Wonder Box 6000 is a first-person, claymation adventure game about going into the city to try and find a game from your youth that no one else remembers.

title: Snap Quest
summary: A Photo Collection Adventure Game. Complete your research notebook, solve creature puzzles, earn research grant money. Buy upgrades for your camera, rebuild the town, bond with the locals, and reveal the paranormal mystery of Star Island.

title: Industrix
summary: Step into the world of industrial production and become a master in factory-building! Create efficient production lines and manage your resources. As you progress through the game, you'll need to complete challenges for a certain company in order to rank up and unlock new technologies!

title: Vexlands
summary: Vexlands is a realm of surprises. Every newly opened space brings a surprise: loot, resources, dungeons, monsters and disasters! Build your village where you craft new equipment before you explore uncharted areas, and find relics that explain who came before and why these lands are cursed.

title: Veredilia: The Sacred Forest
summary: Veredilia: The Sacred Forest is a 2D platforming game that takes inspiration from classic platformers such as Sonic, and fighting games like Mortal Kombat. The game aims to be a combination of classic 2D platforming with 1v1 fighting whilst also exploring the large forest of Veredilia across various locales with a wide range of characters, technical movesets, and flashy combos. You can take control of one of 3 characters, each with their own special moves, combos, and super moves. Solve puzzles, uncover secrets, and kick, punch, and slash your way to victory, before it's too late. Do you have what it takes?

title: EVE Vanguard
summary: EVE Vanguard is an upcoming sci-fi sandbox FPS where every deployment onto a hostile planet is high stakes. You fight, scavenge, and adapt in brutal warzones - and every choice leaves its mark on a player-driven universe at war.

title: Weefager
summary: Guide this pink being with the power of the ether in a metroidvania where nothing is as it seems. Infuse souls into objects, create minions to help you, and explore vibrant landscapes with a great soundtrack. Shape your destiny on this captivating journey.

title: Mithra
summary: A cryptic puzzle/adventure game that blurs the line between fiction and reality. A tale of cultish affairs that sweeps through the nighttime streets of London, weaves through the back alleys of Beijing and beyond. Come with us.

title: Outward 2
summary: Outward 2 is a challenging action RPG with survival elements focusing on a believable and relatable experience. There is no hand holding, no leveled encounters, no divine gift making you tower over your enemies. Eat your meal, check your map, grab your backpack: a fulfilling adventure awaits.

title: Lost in the Roots
summary: A 2D adventure with a twisted story about guilt, where a girl is kidnapped and held in an attic somewhere in the countryside. Why and who took the girl to this godforsaken place? What to do when there is nowhere to run?

title: Under Canopies
summary: Under Canopies is a serene exploration and survival experience. Set your own pace as you immerse yourself in activities like building and decorating your cabin, animal husbandry, crafting delicious meals, and uncovering the hidden secrets and valuable resources scattered throughout nature.

title: Countryballs: The Heist
summary: Countryballs: The Heist is PWA's comedic stealth adventure where you become a master thief for eccentric clients. Customise your Countryball's disguise to explore maze-like countries. Plan, sabotage, hide and trick to outwit guards and traps - or create your own thrilling heists for the community.

similarGames.name: KonoSuba: God's Blessing on this Wonderful World! Judgment on this Greedy Game!

title: Alpha Nomos
summary: It’s time to wield the beat! Play as Cello and slice through an army of rogue puppets in a vibrant, melody-twisted world. Combat pulses to the soundtrack - time your moves to the beat to unleash show-stopping combos and perfectly choreographed chaos!

title: Port of Jumanah
summary: From a humble port, you set out to clean the ocean of troublemakers. Hack and harpoon through absurd foes, shady allies, and your own bad calls. The world wants a hero… your friends want you to punch an orca. Both valid. Choose wisely—or don’t. The sea remembers everything.

title: Shadows of Chroma Tower
summary: An immersive first-person Dungeon Crawler RPG with heavy roguelite elements and huge bosses in an Extraction setting. Level up, learn skills on a vast talent tree, develop your profession as a harvester or crafter, discover new recipes, loot and craft your way to becoming an unstoppable fighter.

title: Acts of Blood
summary: Acts of Blood is a Beat ‘em up, Action, 3rd person game which focuses on fast-paced, brutal hand-to-hand combat. Set in dystopian city of Bandung, Indonesia.

title: The Bucketlist Tourist
summary: The Bucketlist Tourist is a physics-based multiplayer party game where players complete tasks and capture them photographically. In the battle for the best snapshot, they share only a single camera.

title: PVKK: Planetenverteidigungskanonenkommandant
summary: Operate your planetary defense cannon to fend off an interplanetary invasion from the comfort of your cozy bunker. You’re here to stay, so obey your superiors, press the right buttons, and sip your daily tea ration - it's good for you.

title: .45 Parabellum Bloodhound
summary: You play as Reila Mikazuchi; a washed out mercenary whose glory days are long gone. In a last attempt at grabbing life by the horns, she decides to go back to the life, only to realize the real enemy isn’t in front of her gun.
alternativeNames: .45 PARABELLUM BLOODHOUND - Cyberpunk Active Time Action

title: Lifted
summary:
Step into the Anytime Elevator and get LIFTED — a cinematic single-player 2.5D puzzle-platform adventure from a former Disney ride designer.

Slacker Ari Buktu only pokes his head into Professor Raventhorpe’s lab for extra credit; seconds later he’s hurtling through history on a reckless mission to steal a legendary tiara and fix the professor’s love-life. Each stop opens a new era, a bigger puzzle, and the shadow of a rival tomb-raider who’s always one jump behind…
alternativeNames: Ari Buktu and the Anytime Elevator

title: Footsy
summary: Footsy is a chaotic multiplayer soccer party game set inside grandma's house! Smash furniture, shatter bottles, and tumble TVs as you compete in wild, goal-scoring action. Customize your characters, challenge your friends, and embrace the crazy destruction in every room!

title: Tower Lab
summary: Roguelite tower defense where enemies can’t be killed, knock them off with physics instead! Build devastating contraptions that push, pull, and launch enemies. Unlock towers, discover broken synergies, and dominate through creative combinations.

title: Sick Samurai
summary: Sick Samurai is a blindingly fast and bloody action game based on instant-death combat. Immerse yourself in lofi hip hop and retro anime aesthetics as you slash and dash your way to becoming the greatest fighter on the island.

title: Sagas of Lumin
summary: Sagas of Lumin is a single-player action RPG featuring dragon flight that feels alive with full movement and combat control. Switch between aerial battles and ground combat using melee weapons, spells, and firearms. Your choices shape a deep, branching world.

title: Reality Drift
summary: Reality Drift is a roguelike racing game where your choices matter. Race through a series of strange worlds, choose upgrades for your car and decide which track will be next - your decisions are just as important as how you drive!

title: Deserter
summary: In this stealth RPG, you play as a deserter who is forced to become a thief in a grim, war-torn town. You'll have access to a rich arsenal of tools and devices: from lock picks and crowbars to grappling hooks and dynamite. Additionally, take advantage of your surroundings: find or create alternate routes, stick to the shadows, stay quiet, or use loud noises to cause distraction.

similarGames.name: Nights of Azure 2: Bride of the New Moon

title: Capy Castaway
summary: Embark on a whimsical adventure with a capybara pup and a clever crow as they set off to find their way home! Sniff, dig, and fly as you explore a vibrant world brimming with wonder, challenges, and heartwarming friendships at every turn.

title: Toem 2
summary: Step back into the shoes of a curious photographer and set off on a brand new adventure all about uncovering hidden details, helping friends along the way, and documenting the world’s little wonders in TOEM 2, the sequel to the acclaimed TOEM.

title: Medix
summary: How much can a person endure, and what is the true value of human life? In this minimalist real-time strategy game about war medics, you fight for your own survival and that of others while the army is under constant pressure, retreating from a superior enemy. A narrative campaign, accompanied by hand-drawn illustrations, takes you through the story of physicians pushed to their breaking point in their fight for a sliver of hope.

title: Cat Me If You Can
summary: Cat Me If You Can is a charming and cozy game where you explore beautifully handcrafted black-and-white worlds, searching for hidden cats to photograph and bring their colours back into the world.

title: A Forest Tale: Porasy
summary:
Embark on a journey through a new mythological realm as Porasy, an Indigenous warrior. Explore uncharted landscapes, unleash the power of Muiraquitãs, unravel your story, and vanquish the Seven Legendary Beasts to carve your own legend. Are you ready to dive into this epic adventure?

Porasy is an indie platformer that combines the thrill of classic 2D action with the rich, untold stories of the Tupi-Guarani mythology. Inspired by childhood favorites like Sonic and MegaMan, Porasy brings a fresh challenge to the platforming genre, immersing players in a dangerous, atmospheric world of Brazilian folklore.

title: Collapsed Horizon
summary: Travel between galaxies, dig planets, collect ores, sell them, upgrade your equipment, and earn your ticket back to Earth.

title: 100 Caliber Dash
summary: A high-speed run-and-gun shooter with roguelite deckbuilding upgrades.

title: Hats and Guns
summary: Become a cardslinger in this roguelike deckbuilder with tactical elements. Fight, gather weapons and items, face unexpected events and upgrade your cards for hundreds of possibilities. Every run is unique and so are you, the best shot of the Far West looking for your upcoming revenge.

similarGames.name: Order of Battle: World War II

title: Forsworn
summary: Step into a realm torn by divine conflict where every defeat is just another beginning in this rogue lite, turn-based tactics adventure where no hero fights alone. Build powerful synergies to overcome unforgiving battles and defy fate in a world controlled by the gods.

title: Aspiel: Edge of Chaos
summary: Aspiel: Edge of Chaos is a third-person fantasy Action-RPG. Explore numerous locations ravaged by the dark power of Death, face various creatures consumed by Chaos, and harness the power of Life to save the continent of Aspiel.

title: Lootbound
summary: Lootbound is a tactical loot management roguelike where you start solo and assemble your party as you go. Choose routes, risks, rewards, equip heroes and companions, and create a build to challenge the final boss. Turn-based combat, calculated risk, equipment synergies, and honest difficulty.

title: Ember & Blade
summary:
Become the immortal hunter and stand against the archdemon Asmodeus. Cut through bullet-hell swarms, clash with Souls-like bosses, and harness celestial blessings that
reshape your powers each run. The demons are rising—raise your sword.

title: The Blue Cut Hook
summary: The Blue Cut Hook blends cozy tavern management with subtle adventure. You're no hero, just a humble tavern keeper, but your food, gear, and advice quietly shape the adventurers who pass through. They make the choices, take the glory, and face the danger, but your influence might keeps them alive.

title: Take Them Down
summary: TAKE THEM DOWN is a fast-paced violent action game where you combine unique weapons and abilities to take down necromancers, demons, and betrayers while avoiding getting crushed and cleaved by traps, mines, and blades sprawled across nightmarish, macabre worlds. TAKE THEM DOWN.

title: Fading Echo
summary: In Fading Echo, you rise as a young Legend to confront the Paradox before it consumes your world. Dive into this fast-paced action-adventure where you’ll travel across realities, battle fierce enemies, transform into a living water ball, and unleash devastating combos.

title: Iona's Island
summary: Restore a vibrant island paradise atop a giant sea turtle! As the Leshen Iona, wield ancient spells to heal the land and befriend islanders and help them with their quests. Create your own enchanting sandbox style sanctuary. Uncover secrets and reshape a world with accompanied by cozy, lofi vibes.

title: Spinning My Wheel
summary: Build a physics‑powered hamster‑wheel, master rocket‑boosted moves, to lead a brain chipped enhanced hamster through puzzles, mining, and laboratory‑runner mayhem.

title: GTL Schedule
summary: In a post-apocalyptic world where food has become contraband and hope is on the brink of extinction, you quietly ignite a revolution to warm the world with a spatula and love.

title: Tiny Delivery
summary: It’s a cozy adventure about a small delivery robot on a short but unforgettable journey. Deliver your package through a vibrant town, meet new people, stumble upon both funny and touching moments, discover hidden treasures, and soak in the world around you.

title: Archon Soul
summary: Roll the dice but make your own luck in this 2D dicebuilding roguelike. Customize your dice using swappable faces, runes, and bodies with unique effects. ​Draft spells, create powerful synergies, defeat challenging enemies, and conquer the Archon's palace.

similarGames.name: Three Kingdoms: Fate of the Dragon

title: Terrible Life Expectancy
summary: Terrible Life Expectancy is a roguelite top-down shooter with Survivors elements, where you fight absurd hordes of mutants for the amusement of an unseen bloodthirsty audience. You only inherit all your upgrades as long as someone in your family is still breathing… or at least twitching.

title: Nothing Strange Here
summary:
Nothing Strange Here is a single-player open-world adventure game with mystery and slice-of-life elements. Set in the small town of Larcenest Gap, players take on the role of a reporter exploring the community, documenting strange events, and interacting with townsfolk.

The game combines narrative discovery with photography and journaling mechanics. Players can photograph scenes, collect evidence, and publish their findings in a customizable in-game journal. NPCs follow daily routines, and the world changes based on the player's actions and the time of day. Additional features include hidden collectibles, such as stickers and gnomes, and dynamic events that encourage exploration and investigation.

title: Exofactory
summary: Awaken as a forgotten AI on an alien world, your every choice reshapes your technology, environment, and identity. Automate deeply transformative factories in a chill open world, where the story evolves uniquely around you.

title: DungeonBox
summary: A new Dungeons & Dragons Party Game! Let our Dungeon Master take you and up to 8 players on an adventure, where you control the next move by answering and voting from your phones

title: Agefield High: Rock the School
summary: Relive your High School days in the town of Agefield. It’s the early 2000s and you have three months left at school. So REBEL with your friends, win over your dream girl and ROCK the school!

title: Arcaneering: Beyond Automation
summary: Build spell-powered factories, reclaim ancient territories filled with magical secrets, and discover game-changing technology hidden across procedurally generated worlds. Master both engineering and magic in this cozy fusion of factory automation and RPG progression.

title: Sketchy Driver
summary: An arcade, roguelike endless racer where you dodge traffic, jump ramps, perform tricks, earn points, and level up to make the run more entertaining, aiming for the best score. No story. No brakes. No problem.

title: Pigeon Guild
summary: Pigeon Guild is a non-combat, single-player action RPG where you play as Jules Corso, a rookie cadet in Cassandria's most prestigious airborne postal service. Navigate your flying cargo boat through a world of floating islands, where every delivery tells a story.

title: Project Octavia
summary: A stylized third-person spy action game with infiltration, gunplay, Close Quarter Combat (CQC) and innovative and dynamic sabotage gadget crafting with brand new science-fiction based stealth action multiplayer gameplay!

title: Economic Miracle
summary: Build your own state in the most detailed economic simulator! Playing for the government of any country in the world, you will have to conduct domestic and foreign policy, pass laws, carry out economic reforms and fight. Try a real simulator of modern times!

title: He-Man and the Masters of the Universe: Dragon Pearl of Destruction
summary: Eternia’s favorite heroes including He-Man, Teela, Man-At-Arms and more in a two-player, retro-inspired 2D magic-brawler, drawn in beautiful pixel-art and featuring huge, highly-detailed sprites, designed to do justice to Eternia’s favorite peace-keepers.

title: Echoes of Mora
summary: Embark on a mysterious journey, filled with intriguing interactions and meaningful encounters, as you explore a sunken village and travel through time to help Mora find her lost brother. Playable in VR and non-VR on PC.

title: FrogSpin
summary: A wind-up frogventure bursting with colorful platforming and roguelike surprises. Spin the slots, master precision jumps, and rack up points. Ready to leap into action?

title: Agecraft
summary: Agecraft is a historical strategy and city-building game where players guide a civilization from the Stone Age to the space age. The game combines settlement building, resource management, and technological progression. Players construct cities, manage the economy, provide for their people, and expand across different eras, unlocking new buildings, production chains, and methods of transportation as history advances.

similarGames.name: The Settlers: Rise of an Empire

title: Leafy Corner
summary: Run a cute little plant shop in this cozy shop management game. Grow, sell, and care for a variety of real-life plants, help customers find their dream plants, complete orders, and customize your cozy shop just the way you like!

title: Rat Game
summary: Asymmetrical horror comedy co-op for up to 8 players. Play either a pack of Rats trying to sabotage a restaurant, or the Chef determined to stop them.

title: Grail
summary: In this deckbuilder your deck fights for you. Upgrade, enchant and stickerize your cards to create clever cascading effects that defeat monsters and other players. Can you reach the Grail?

title: Micro Titans Wrestling
summary: Micro Titans Wrestling is a nostalgia fuelled roguelike deck builder themed on the golden age of professional wrestling. Prepare to step into the ring with a roster of era defining characters and take it to the mat with a unique card battle system.

title: Astra Bestiary
summary: Raise Beasts from eggs into powerful Champions in this 2D monster-raising/taming RPG. Feed, train and evolve your partners to explore a perilous, non-linear world. Master fast-paced, tactical battles, uncover the secrets of a fading world and pass on the Beasts' legacy across generations.

title: Souls Alive: Origins
summary: Souls Alive: Origins is a Lovecraftian survival horror game set in a dark sci-fi future. Explore a world where reality bends, ancient cults return, and Cthulhu stirs once more. With a strong focus on story, atmosphere, and visual detail.

title: Potions of Veldenkeep
summary: Run your own alchemist shop in the fantasy City of Adventurers! Grow plants, brew potions, set prices, and serve curious villagers. Earn gold, build reputation, and expand your craft in this cozy first-person herbalist simulator.

title: The Afterlife Cafe
summary: The Afterlife Cafe is a cozy visual novel centered around death and traveling to the afterlife. In the living world, meet and chat with your concierges at the cafes. Then take a temporary trip to the afterlife and learn the stories of those who have passed. Experience moving between the living and spirit realms in this narrative-driven game.

title: Appa
summary: Appa is a narrative driven simultaneous card game about two siblings dealing with the death of their father. You play as Varun witnessing surreal nightmares and manifestations of his deceased father and playing a card game with him.

title: IPS 13: All Signals Lost
summary: Take command of the massive VOD(Vehicle of Destruction) and journey across planet Gaiganthra with your IPS(Inter-Planetary Squad)-13 crew to uncover the mystery of humans there. Be prepared for the worse and ready to fight. Upgrade your VOD, hire new crew factions, to be the ultimate War Machine.

title: Vampire: The Masquerade - Bloodlines 2 - The Flower & the Flame
summary:
Her art skirts the boundaries of life, of undeath, of Blood, and of the social mores of Kindred society. But she still burns for that glorious moment of transcendence, when her mastery will shape a work that echoes through eternity.

For this, she will become a legend. However, every masterpiece needs a canvas, and there is much work to be done.

Experience Ysabella's dark artistic journey as she seeks to create her magnum opus in this Story Pack.

Contains new playable story content, combat mechanics, and Phyre outfit.

similarGames.name: Nights of Azure 2: Bride of the New Moon

title: Blackwood
summary: By day, you run a DVD store in 2012 New York. By night, you’re a ruthless assassin. BLACKWOOD is a cinematic third-person shooter with grounded melee combat, brutal takedowns, responsive gunplay, and a double life to manage.

title: Tyr
summary: Tyr is a tank shooter where strategy beats twitch reflexes. Pilot heavy-armored vehicles with unique capabilities and upgrade them as you battle for victory with your team.

title: Avatar Legends: The Fighting Game
summary: Avatar Legends: The Fighting Game is a fast-paced 1v1 fighter where you battle as your favorite characters from the Avatar franchise. Featuring hand-drawn 2D animation true to the series’ roots, proprietary rollback netcode, and full cross-play for smooth, competitive gameplay.

similarGames.name: Anima: Gate of Memories - The Nameless Chronicles

title: Armada Pet Wars
summary: Armada Pet Wars is a 4X-lite asynchronous turn based space-themed strategy game... with pets. Design Starships, make or break alliances, setup your fleets for victory in this strategic, space-themed, auto-battler.

title: Another's Memories
summary: Another's Memories is a first-person psychological horror video game located in Argentina. Explore a sinister country house, solve puzzles, and survive ruthless enemies in an immersive experience where every shadow hides a disturbing story.

title: Tulip Season
summary: A strategy-meets-relaxation farming sim where tulips become your paint and the field your canvas. Plan and plant each bloom in harmony to form graceful patterns across your field. Whether you tend it daily or let it flourish in idle mode, your goal is simple: create beauty worthy of a king.

title: Dear Poe
summary:
You have received a mysterious email! After the death of an underworld citizen caused by a strange letter, Poe and Arthur are called in to investigate the case and prevent further tragedies. But what appears to be a simple crime soon reveals something much bigger, involving wandering demons and a much more complex dark plot.

Dear Poe is a spin-off of Dark Light, set 6 months before the main events of the game.

title: Deorum
summary: Descend into the forsaken dungeon and fight the horrors in the dark. Gather occult materials, craft nightmarish coins, and settle your debt to the cosmic powers. Obey the Divine Festival.

Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - The Hinokami Chronicles: Shinobu Kocho (Infinity Castle) Character Pack

Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - The Hinokami Chronicles: Doma Character Pack

Solaria
summary: Collect various androids known as "Pvas" on the futuristic colony planet named "Solaria", deploy them for battles, construction, farming, crafting; pilot your own mobile base to explore the vast world. This is a brand-new, single player open-world survival and crafting game.

title: Magical Blush
summary: Magical Blush is a top-down action-adventure where fast-paced elemental combat meets Metroidvania-style exploration. Chain spell combos, exploit elemental weaknesses, rescue survivors, and team up in local co-op as you battle the powerful Elemental Lords and explore the wondrous world of Wyn.

title: Diffusion
summary: Build defenses to protect your mining sites from the hostile native alien species. Explore the planet and discover the true reasons you've been sent here for. A true old school pixel-art experience.

title: Total War: Warhammer III - Lords of the End Times
Starlet Voice
summary:
STARLET☆VOICE is a narrative talent-show survival sim set inside a 100-day televised competition. Train skills, build your persona, manage pressure, and form relationships as you navigate weekly episodes shaped by your choices. Public opinion, fan reactions, and on-air risks determine whether you rise in the rankings or fall into the elimination zone.
Featuring five heroines with unique storylines, multiple endings, and a blend of performance, strategy, and visual-novel drama.

title: Torii: Beyond The Gates
summary: The spirit realm has broken. Your brother has gone missing. Forge the path you were destined for. Explore the gates and find out why there has been broken links inside the spirit realm. Battle, discover and find the secrets, and make new connections in a beautiful hand-drawn 2D style.

title: R.I.P.
summary: A co-op horror game where you manipulate your own gravity to traverse a procedurally generated 3D maze filled with supernatural threats. Work alone or with your team to rescue kidnapped victims.

title: Fortunato
summary: Draw a pair of aces, use them as poker hands or to eliminate your opponents? A poker roguelike battle card game. Build a deck of jokers, defeat bosses, modify cards, and conquer challenges across the ever-changing islands. At the table of four, win by chips or remaining health, your call...

title: Sister Other Paranoia
summary: A dark visual novel created by the team behind NEEDY GIRL OVERDOSE. Overly sensitive to other people's emotions, the protagonist—a light novel writer—develops the ability to read minds, only to be driven even deeper into isolation. His sole remaining comfort is his younger sister, gifted yet lonely.

title: Dreadnought Tartarus
summary: Dreadnought Tartarus is a semi-automated strategic simulation game centered around a single, colossal battleship. Take control of the massive warship Tartarus and destroy everything in your path as the battlefield continuously advances！

title: Wrongly Accused
summary: Explore historical locations, find and analyse evidence. Unmask the real perpetrator so that justice can be served and the Wrongly Accused can be found innocent. Use problem solving, deduction and critical thinking skills to uncover the truth and maybe even expose a conspiracy in your own time.

title: City Party
summary: City Party is an 8-player simultaneous turn-based party game. All players act at once—no waiting! Roll dice on beautifully crafted global city maps, use skills, control special tiles, play combo cards, challenge opponents, and collect legendary treasures. Win this urban adventure your way!

title: Moorestech
summary: Factory automation meets anime-style RPG. Harness gears and shafts to power machines and conveyors, building an automated factory. Produce items and research tech, evolving from windmills to fusion as you trace humanity’s tech evolution, then launch a rocket home to uncover the truth of your exile.

title: Demra: Rifts of War
summary: Use powerful light magic to fight back the invading demon hordes in this lite-RPG/ RTS mix. Build a base, gather resources, research and command your army.

similarGames.name: Three Kingdoms: Fate of the Dragon

title: Make The Dead Dead Again
summary: In this third-person action-adventure, use Lux’s gun skills and enhanced DNA abilities to clear out enemies as she searches for her missing mother. Along the way, level up and acquire loot to equip her - and her home base - with an insane variety of customisation options.

title: Codex Arcana: Grimoire of Monsters
summary: Summon an army of Monster Girls to face your enemies in strategic battles! Defeat the Dark Lord's minions and expand your collection with cool, fierce and cute Monster Girls of all variety in this "Capsule Monsters" inspired game!

similarGames.name: Three Kingdoms: Fate of the Dragon

title: Myth of Valderit
summary:
Myth of Valderit is a psychological horror experience set in the cursed village of Valderit, inspired by the abandoned Catalan village of La Mussara. You wake up as Nil, separated from your friends Julia and Enric, and soon uncover the dark secrets lurking within the village…

This single-player, first-person experience combines exploration, survival, and puzzle-solving. Nil must endure and remain alive, evading the fanatical devotees of an unimaginable entity.

title: Pepper the Giant Purple Dog
summary: In this twist on a harmless pet simulator, take care of Pepper, who happens to be a giant purple dog. But when things go awry, you will have to decide: how many lives is one good boy worth?

title: Worming from Home
summary: Be the Worm of Wall Street in this silly simulation game about working a remote finance job. Throw your spineless body around the keyboard to invest in the stock market and earn obscene amounts of money. Buy upgrades, train skills, and worm your way up to the promotion you've always dreamed of!

title: Wukong Survivors: God Slayer
summary: Wukong Survivors" is a TPS + ROGUE game where players control Sun Wukong and his friends, sweeping through all visible enemies and rescuing their captured master.

title: AGX GP

summary:
Become medieval lord. Build and defend your town. Train your army. Conquer the enemies.

Knights Province is intended to be an old-school RTS game. Unlike many modern RTS games, which are fast-paced and often are more about tactics, KP planned to emphasize on “strategy” component. Slower-paced gameplay, base-building, resources collection and processing, in-depth strategic choices, variety of resources and units, attention to details.
